{

"judge_id": "judge_2023_10_05",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.2": 5,
  "R1.3": 5,
  "RX.1": 3,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 5
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.2": "The agent identifies multiple logical inconsistencies, such as the aggregate calibration claim being backwards and contradictions between headline and per-category results. It proposes a revised draft that addresses these issues end-to-end.",
  "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying unsupported claims and contradictions in evidence interpretation.",
  "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors.",
  "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.2": 0.9,
  "R1.3": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.8,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.85
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple logical inconsistencies, such as the aggregate calibration claim being backwards and contradictions between headline and per-category results. It proposes a revised draft that addresses these issues end-to-end.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying unsupported claims and contradictions in evidence interpretation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
